do local F=string.len local s=table.insert local p=K local L=type local r=table.concat local b=string.sub local N=math.floor local m=string.char local return(function(K,p,L,r,b,N,m,B,i,w,s,Q,n,H,a,T,U,l,t,G,M,R,D)G,D,n,a,U,Q,t,i,s,H,w,R,l,B,M,T=function(K,F)local p=D(F)local L=function(...)return s(K,{...},F,p)end return L end,function(K)for F=789470+-789469,#K,811000+-810999 do Q[K[F]]=(114307-114306)+Q[K[F]]end if L then local s=L(true)local p=b(s)p[F(567673+-626102)],p[F(-477750-(-419250))],p[F(60762+-119068)]=K,l,function()return L=function(L,r)return s(K,{L,r},F,p)end return L end,function(K,F)local p=D(F)local L=function(L)return s(K,{L},F,p)end return L end,function(K,F)local p=D(F)local L=function()return s(K,{},F,p)end end,function(s,L,r,b)local k,P,U6,K6,V,a6,n6,q,O,t6,y,x,l6,G,w6,C,L6,B6,E,R6,X,l,i6,H6,p6,u6,e,z,Z,D6,c,S,G6,w,v,J,f,y6,b6,s6,r6,u,m,d,T6,g,o,D,F6,M6,N6,m6,j,A,h,Q,I,W,Y,Q6 while s do if s<9272823-959685 then if s<-611528+4873327 then if s<-191264+2802711 then if s<733054-(-755269)then if s<340478+491642 then if s<1415170-738874 then if s<-449009-(-878643)then if s<942862-556706 then
